seo_content:
Funded Trading Plus 10% OFF Launch Deal

Funded Trading Plus is offering a verified 10% discount via the launch code LAUNCH, applicable across their Prestige, Experienced, and Master challenge programs up to $100,000. This launch promotion provides immediate savings at checkout and serves as the perfect entry point for traders who want to experience the UK's most respected static drawdown prop model at a reduced initial cost.

Funded Trading Plus is a UK-based proprietary trading firm that has built its reputation on the foundation of the static drawdown model — an approach that keeps your maximum loss limit fixed from the day you open the account, regardless of how much profit you subsequently earn. This structural innovation has made Funded Trading Plus a preferred destination for traders who have been burned by the trailing drawdown model that can turn strong performance into a failed challenge.

With code LAUNCH, you save 10% on any of the three primary program tiers: Prestige (entry level), Experienced (mid-tier), and Master (up to $100K). All three programs benefit from the static drawdown protection, the DXTrade platform, and Funded Trading Plus's institutional UK infrastructure. The launch code applies to both new accounts and additional challenge purchases, making it usable by returning traders as well.

Funded Trading Plus offers forex and CFD instruments with clear, straightforward challenge rules. The profit targets and drawdown limits are set at evaluation start and do not change throughout the challenge. Payouts are handled through established channels with a reliable processing timeline, and the firm has maintained a consistent payout record since launch.

To activate this code, use the affiliate link above to reach Funded Trading Plus, choose between the Prestige, Experienced, or Master program, and enter LAUNCH at checkout for your 10% savings. The discount is applied instantly. Review the specific profit targets and drawdown limits for each program tier on the Funded Trading Plus site to select the right account for your trading style and risk tolerance.
